cause: Fatal error, stack overflow, or invalid memory access
solution: Check for infinite recursion, stack overflow, or null pointer access. Increase stack size in platformio.ini with build_flags = -DCORE_DEBUG_LEVEL=3
Use a better quality USB cable with data wires. Connect to a powered USB hub or external 5V power supply. Check USB cable for broken data wires.

cause: Board not in flashing mode or wrong COM port
solution: Hold BOOT button, press and release EN/RST button, then release BOOT button. Select correct COM port. Install CP210x USB drivers.

pattern: Timed out waiting for packet header
solution: Press and hold BOOT button while starting upload. Try different USB cable. Lower upload speed in platformio.ini.
Enable core dump with esp_exception_tracker. Check serial output for panic details. Review code for assert() calls.

cause: Attempted to access flash or protected memory from interrupt
solution: Don't use flash functions (SPI, flash read/write) from ISR. Move flash operations to main task. Use xTaskNotifyFromISR instead of direct flash access.

cause: Invalid memory read or null pointer dereference
solution: Check for uninitialized pointers. Validate array bounds. Ensure variables are properly allocated.
Check alignment of data structures. Ensure buffers are properly aligned for DMA.
Use esp_timer API instead of legacy timer. Ensure ISR is declared with IRAM_ATTR. Disable interrupts during critical sections.

cause: Task blocked too long without yielding
solution: Add vTaskDelay() or yield() in long loops. Break long operations into smaller chunks. Feed the watchdog in your task.

cause: I2C device not responding or wrong address
solution: Verify device address with I2C scanner. Check SDA/SCL connections. Add pull-up resistors (4.7K-10K). Ensure correct pull-up voltage.
Verify SSID and password. Check signal strength. Ensure WiFi channel is supported. Disable WiFi sleep mode for stable connection.
Ensure BT/BLE is enabled in sdkconfig. Check power supply can handle BT current peaks. Reduce BLE connection parameters.
Reduce buffer sizes. Free unused memory. Use static allocation instead of dynamic. Check for memory leaks.
Erase flash with esptool.py. Reflash bootloader. Ensure adequate power during flashing.
